# Rober González - Personal Portfolio

> Single-page personal portfolio for Rober González, Senior Product Designer focused on AI products, design systems, and frontend prototyping. Based in Spain, working remotely.

The site is a single-page portfolio styled as an interactive 80s/90s CRT terminal. It boots with a BIOS sequence and an ASCII portrait, then auto-runs `whoami`, `cat about.txt` and `ls contact/` to present Rober's profile. A live prompt accepts commands (`help`, `about`, `contact`, `cv`, `system`, `font`, `clear`) and switches between phosphor color themes (green/amber/light) and terminal fonts.

## About Rober

- Senior Product Designer focused on AI, based in Spain, working remotely.
- Currently designing AI software at Maisa AI, shaping how people interact with and trust AI agents.
- 15+ years across startups (Fresh People), agencies (Populate), and enterprise (NTT Data), with clients like Santander, IAG, Acciona and Airbus.
- Specializes in AI product design and design systems, from user research to frontend code.

## Primary Links

- [Website](https://rober.design/): Homepage, the interactive terminal portfolio.
- [CV](https://rober.design/cv): Full curriculum vitae and work history.
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/robergd/): Professional profile and contact.
- [Email](mailto:hi@rober.design): Direct contact at hi@rober.design.

## Related

- [Maisa AI](https://maisa.ai): Current employer, an AI software company.

## Technical Notes

- Stack: Vanilla HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, no frontend framework.
- Semantic structure with an accessible hidden heading, and full content rendered without JavaScript.
- Reduced-motion support via `prefers-reduced-motion`.
